role: This directory provides the prompt engineering toolkit for ArchSpine, including templates, rendering blocks, examples, and schemas used to generate structured semantic summaries via LLM.
responsibility: It collectively defines the reusable components for constructing LLM prompts that produce consistent JSON summaries for source files, documents, configurations, folders, and projects within the ArchSpine mirror system.

children.role: LLM prompt template for generating structured JSON architecture diagram specifications from project and folder summaries.
Pure utility functions for rendering structured text blocks, primarily used in LLM prompt construction within ArchSpine.
Static content module providing few-shot examples for semantic role description generation.
Public API facade aggregating and re-exporting prompt template schemas, rendering blocks, and example data.
Schema definition module providing JSON templates for ArchSpine semantic summary units.
